title: Westland Horticulture Orchid Mist Spray 250ml
features: Specially formulated with for orchids with essential nutrients
Nutrient rich fine mist spray for intense plant hydration
keeps leaves moist, clean & healthy, with a natural shine
description: From the manufacturer Westland Orchid Mist Westland Orchid Mist is a revitalising, purified water mist spray that creates the ideal humid climate for healthy leaf growth. The combined gentle cleaning action and extra rich nutrients keeps orchids flowering for longer and keeps leaves moist, clean & healthy, with a natural shine. Key Benefits Ready to use Nutrient rich filtered water for longer lasting flowers Fine mist spray for Intense hydration Westland Orchid Mist Why Use? Westland Orchid Mist is Nutrient rich filtered water for longer lasting flowers. The fine mist spray creates an ideal humid climate and keeps plants hydrated. The mist action replicates a rainfall effect, the orchids natural water source. When to Use Use Orchid Mist all year round. How to Use Shake bottle before use. Spray onto the leaves and aerial roots 1-2 times a week. Apply thinly and evenly until leaves and roots are visibly wet. Handy Tips It’s hard to know how often to water your Orchids. Westland Orchid Water is perfect. Simply pour 2 capfuls of Orchid Water every week into the top of the orchid plant pot for healthy growth and longer lasting flowers.
